column8: A group of people in London are trying to get their fellow citizens to open up and chat with one another more often. They've embarked on a campaign called "Talk to me London", because the city has been accused of being_______________ . (FRIEND)
column9: The idea is to change the perception of London. The founders of the_______________believe talking is something we all love to do, but many people are afraid to talk to people they don't know. (MOVE)
column10: The group behind "Talk to me London" is a collection of people from_______________backgrounds, such as business, design, media and other fields. Their work on the project is voluntary. (VARY)
column11: The project has attracted some attention in the press. Some people find it to be a pleasant idea, but others have dismissed the idea_______________. They say they moved to London so that they wouldn't have to talk to people! (ENTIRE)
column12: Of course, one of the benefits of living in a big city is that you can remain anonymous. However, be rarely talking to anyone, you risk suffering from____________ . (LONELY)
column13: Perhaps some people will appreciate the campaign and give life to it. After all, it shouldn't be such a challenging task to talk to____________ . (STRANGE)
column14: Apps are those little computer programs we use on our mobile phones and other small devices. The word "app is an abbreviation for software_____________ . (APPLY)
column15: Apps have been very popular since the rise of smartphones. There are apps for banking transactions, weather forecasts, video games, maps, calendars and other forms of data_____________ . (MANAGE)
column16: Many are available free of charge, or are at least ______________. Some apps with more sophisicated features can cost quite a bit money, however. (EXPENSIVE)
column17: An estimated 102 billion apps were downloaded in 2013, proving that the general public's _______________to apps has been positive. (REACT)
column18: Some apps are quite amazing, such as one that tell you what song is playing in a restaurant of cafe. Others are______________strange - there's an app that makes a whistling sound that only a dog can hear! (POSITIVE)
column19: When a software company releases a new app, it's often a______________event. Celebrities make appearances and loads of fans queue up to get a glimpse of them, and perhaps check out the app, too. (MASS)
